findings.rationale: Reviewed via debate-decision: spawn uses fixed python/python3 --version probing through resolveSupportedPythonCommand; no CLI/API/config/network values may reach command or args, and new callers require re-audit. Assumes same-user CLI execution with trusted PATH.
Reviewed via debate-decision: production callers use os.homedir(), suffix is fixed .claude.json, and no CLI/API/config input reaches homeDir.

Reviewed via debate-decision: pythonCommand comes from fixed python/python3 probing and args are fixed ['-m', 'openrouter_mcp.server']; no user-controlled executable or module args may reach this spawn path without re-audit. Assumes same-user CLI execution with trusted PATH.

Reviewed via debate-decision: current runCommand callers use fixed Python checks, repository-local requirements install, and Claude Code commands from local constants/package metadata; no CLI/API/config/network values may reach command or args, and new callers require re-audit. Assumes same-user CLI execution with trusted PATH.
